deep_dive.title: Efficient Sim-to-Real Transfer of World-Action Models from Synthetic Priors
deep_dive.abstract: Bridging the sim-to-real gap is a core challenge in deploying learned manipulation policies. Sim-to-real learning is attractive because it can replace expensive real robot demonstrations with scalable synthetic data, yet world-action models have not previously been shown to transfer from simulation to real robotic manipulation. We study whether a world-action model can be trained from synthetic priors and deployed zero-shot in the real world. To this end, we build upon Cosmos Policy, a video diffusion model adapted for visuomotor control. We construct simulation environments with extensive domain randomization and generate demonstrations using the AnyTask motion planning pipeline. We evaluate our approach across object lifting, drawer opening, and pick-and-place tasks using ${\sim}800$ synthetic demonstrations per task and no real demonstrations. When deployed zero-shot on a Franka Robot, our policy attains a 35\% average success rate. To our knowledge, this represents the first successful sim-to-real transfer of a world-action model for robotic manipulation.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: World-action model transfer from sim to real using synthetic priors
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用合成先验将世界动作模型从仿真迁移到真实
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用合成先验将世界动作模型从仿真迁移到真实
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用合成先验将世界动作模型从仿真迁移到真实
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This work demonstrates zero-shot sim-to-real transfer of a world-action model by training a video diffusion model on synthetic data with domain randomization.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文研究世界动作模型从仿真到真实机器人的零样本迁移。基于Cosmos Policy视频扩散模型，在大量域随机化的仿真环境中生成演示数据，训练后的模型无需真实微调即可直接部署到真实机器人上进行物体抓取、抽屉打开等操作，证明了世界动作模型的模拟-真实迁移可行性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文研究世界动作模型从仿真到真实机器人的零样本迁移。基于Cosmos Policy视频扩散模型，在大量域随机化的仿真环境中生成演示数据，训练后的模型无需真实微调即可直接部署到真实机器人上进行物体抓取、抽屉打开等操作，证明了世界动作模型的模拟-真实迁移可行性。

quick_skim.title: 3D Scene-Adaptive Trajectory-Controllable Human Image Animation with Camera Movement
quick_skim.abstract: Human image animation, which aims to generate a video of a reference subject following a provided action sequence, has received increasing research interest. With the development of diffusion-based/flow-based video foundation models, existing animation works have began to upgrade the guidance information from 2D skeleton/pose to 3D modeling conditions. Despite achieving reasonable results, these approaches face challenges in synthesizing trajectory-controllable human motion within natural scene under changed camera views. In this work, we present a scene-adaptive human image animation framework that controls both human motion and camera trajectories within a reconstructed 3D environment for video generation. To achieve this, we first develop a ground-adaptive 3D motion retargeting approach to enable user-friendly motion trajectory control adapting to the changes of elevations of ground and orientations automatically. Then we design a viewpoint-adaptive latent fusion mechanism to inject point-cloud geometric priors through scene-visibility masking into the generative process, providing precise guidance of viewpoint changes under camera control. Experiments on two standard human image animation benchmark datasets demonstrate remarkable improvements of our method over the state of the arts in related video generation metics. Project page: https://robinhood256100.github.io/web-disp
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: 3D scene-adaptive video generation with action and camera control
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 3D场景自适应视频生成，控制动作和相机
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 3D场景自适应视频生成，控制动作和相机
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 3D场景自适应视频生成，控制动作和相机
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a framework for human image animation that controls both human motion and camera trajectories in a reconstructed 3D environment for video generation, enabling scene-adaptive and trajectory-controllable animation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有动画方法难以在自然场景中合成轨迹可控人体运动的问题，本文提出一个场景自适应框架，在重建的3D环境中同时控制人体动作和相机轨迹以生成视频。通过引入3D建模条件和场景约束，实现了更真实的人体动画。实验表明该方法能生成符合场景几何和运动轨迹的高质量视频。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对现有动画方法难以在自然场景中合成轨迹可控人体运动的问题，本文提出一个场景自适应框架，在重建的3D环境中同时控制人体动作和相机轨迹以生成视频。通过引入3D建模条件和场景约束，实现了更真实的人体动画。实验表明该方法能生成符合场景几何和运动轨迹的高质量视频。

quick_skim.title: World from Motion: Generative Dynamic Gaussian Reconstruction from Monocular Video
quick_skim.abstract: We present World from Motion, a method for generating freely renderable dynamic 3D Gaussian representations from monocular videos. Our approach conditions a video model on dense, pixel-aligned renderings that encode appearance, geometry, and 3D scene motion along both input and target camera trajectories to correct rendering artifacts and fill in missing regions from an initial reconstruction. To train this model, we construct a dataset of aligned multiview video pairs and dynamic 3DGS representations, with simulated artifacts characteristic of monocular reconstruction. At test time, we distill the model's generations, including newly observed regions and motions, back into a single consistent, high-quality dynamic 3DGS, improving both novel-view synthesis and the underlying 3D motion. Our method sets a new state of the art in 4D reconstruction and seamlessly generalizes to in-the-wild videos with large viewpoint changes and dynamic motions.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: generative dynamic 3D reconstruction from video, relates to world model generation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于视频的生成式动态3D重建，与世界模型生成相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于视频的生成式动态3D重建，与世界模型生成相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于视频的生成式动态3D重建，与世界模型生成相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Generates freely renderable dynamic 3DGS from monocular video, conditioning a video model on dense renderings for novel view synthesis and motion completion.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 从单目视频生成可渲染的动态3D高斯表示。该方法利用视频模型条件于密集渲染，修正初始重建的伪影并补全缺失区域，构建多视角视频对数据集进行训练。测试时蒸馏到一致的高质量动态3DGS。虽侧重于3D重建，但其生成式动态场景重建技术可用于世界模型的视觉生成。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 从单目视频生成可渲染的动态3D高斯表示。该方法利用视频模型条件于密集渲染，修正初始重建的伪影并补全缺失区域，构建多视角视频对数据集进行训练。测试时蒸馏到一致的高质量动态3DGS。虽侧重于3D重建，但其生成式动态场景重建技术可用于世界模型的视觉生成。

quick_skim.title: SimWorlds: A Multi-Agent System for Dynamic 3D Scene Creation
quick_skim.abstract: LLM agents are increasingly used to translate natural language into 3D scenes in a procedural way, but existing systems focus on static output. Dynamic 4D scenes from text alone, in which liquids flow, particles emit, rigid bodies cascade, and articulated mechanisms move, remain largely unexplored despite their value as editable content and as physics-grounded training data for video generation and embodied AI. Two challenges set the dynamic case apart from static text-to-scene work: an agent must jointly coordinate spatial layout, multiple physics solvers, temporal sequencing, camera, and lighting in a single coherent scene, and verifying motion correctness from rendered video is fundamentally harder than judging a single image. We present SimWorlds: a multi-agent framework that produces dynamic, editable 4D scenes from text, with Blender-specific procedural knowledge, a planner-coder-reviewer workflow driving a fixed ordered sequence of construction stages, a layered scene protocol enforced by a deterministic verifier, and a runtime-state inspection tool suite that catches mechanism failures the rendered image cannot reveal. We also introduce 4DBuildBench, a benchmark for assessing both visual fidelity and physical consistency of the procedural dynamic 3D scenes generated from text prompts. Experiments show that SimWorlds outperforms prior dynamic Blender generation baselines.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: dynamic 4D scene creation as physics-grounded training data for video generation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 动态4D场景创建作为视频生成的物理学训练数据
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 动态4D场景创建作为视频生成的物理学训练数据
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 动态4D场景创建作为视频生成的物理学训练数据
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: SimWorlds uses multi-agent LLM system to create dynamic 4D scenes from text, providing physics-grounded training data for video generation and embodied AI.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有文本到3D系统只能生成静态场景。SimWorlds提出多智能体系统，利用LLM协调物理引擎、相机和光照等要素，从文本生成包含流体、刚体等动态场景（4D）。这些场景可作为视频生成和具身AI的物理合理训练数据，间接支持世界模型发展。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有文本到3D系统只能生成静态场景。SimWorlds提出多智能体系统，利用LLM协调物理引擎、相机和光照等要素，从文本生成包含流体、刚体等动态场景（4D）。这些场景可作为视频生成和具身AI的物理合理训练数据，间接支持世界模型发展。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 基于视频生成模型的World Action Model相关论文, especially work that connects or combines: world action model; world model; generative world model; video action model; video world model; World Action Model using video generation models; video based world action prediction; research on video generation for world models.
